Beginner.question: What is Machine Learning mainly about?

options.A: Learning patterns from data to make predictions or decisions
options.B: Writing every rule manually for the computer

Beginner.question: Which one is an example of data used in Machine Learning?

options.A: A table of house prices and house sizes
options.B: The color of the computer case only
options.C: The power cable of the computer

Beginner.question: What does a Machine Learning model learn from?

options.A: Examples in the data
options.B: Random guesses only

Intermediate.question: In supervised learning, what is included in the training data?

options.A: Input data with correct target values or labels
options.B: Only unlabeled data with no target values

Intermediate.question: Which task is usually a regression problem?

options.A: Predicting the price of a house
options.B: Classifying an email as spam or not spam

Intermediate.question: Which task is usually a classification problem?

options.A: Predicting whether an email is spam or not spam
options.B: Predicting the exact temperature tomorrow
options.C: Predicting the price of a car

Advanced.question: What is the main purpose of regularization in Machine Learning?

options.A: To reduce overfitting by limiting model complexity
options.B: To make the model memorize the training data
options.C: To remove the need for training data

options.A: How well the model may perform on unseen data
options.B: How many files are stored on the computer

options.A: The model performs well on training data but poorly on new data
options.B: The model is too simple to learn any pattern

Beginner.question: What is Deep Learning mainly based on?

options.A: Neural networks with multiple layers
options.B: Writing all rules manually

options.A: It can learn complex patterns from large amounts of data
options.B: It removes the need for data completely
options.C: It only works for simple arithmetic problems

Beginner.question: What is a neural network inspired by?

options.A: The way biological neurons are connected
options.B: The design of computer keyboards
options.C: The order of files in a folder

Beginner.question: Which one is a common Deep Learning application?

options.A: Image recognition
options.B: Changing the color of a laptop

Intermediate.question: What is the role of an activation function in a neural network?

options.A: It helps the network learn non-linear patterns
options.B: It deletes the training data
options.C: It changes the file format only

Intermediate.question: What happens during neural network training?

options.A: The model updates its weights to reduce prediction error
options.B: The model removes all layers

Intermediate.question: What is the purpose of a loss function?

options.A: To measure how wrong the model's predictions are
options.B: To increase the number of images

options.A: Updating weights based on the prediction error
options.B: Displaying images on the screen

Advanced.question: What is the main purpose of dropout in Deep Learning?

options.A: To reduce overfitting by randomly ignoring some neurons during training
options.B: To remove the need for a loss function
options.C: To make the model memorize every training example

Advanced.question: Why are convolutional neural networks commonly used for images?

options.A: They can learn spatial patterns such as edges, shapes, and textures
options.B: They only work with text files

Advanced.question: What problem can vanishing gradients cause?

options.A: Early layers learn very slowly because gradients become too small
options.B: The dataset becomes larger automatically

Advanced.question: What is transfer learning commonly used for?

options.A: Using a pre-trained model and adapting it to a new task
options.B: Moving files from one folder to another
options.C: Deleting old model weights before training
